name: SE Ranking
api_notes: The API provides broad coverage including backlinks, domain research, keyword research, website audits, AI search, and project management (ranks/competitors). It uses JSON responses.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed using a single API key which accesses both Data and Project endpoints.
mcp_notes: An official MCP server exists, allowing integration with AI assistants like Claude Desktop, Cursor, and Gemini CLI.
access_notes: Developers can access the API via a 14-day free trial (100,000 credits) or a pay-as-you-go model. Paid subscription plans and standalone API add-ons are also available.
one_liner: SE Ranking provides a comprehensive SEO and GEO data API that covers keyword research, backlinks, domain analysis, website audits, AI search, and project management.

evidence.claim: The SE Ranking API provides broad access to SEO and project data, and is available via a 14-day free trial with 100,000 credits or pay-as-you-go plans.
The vendor provides an official MCP (Model Context Protocol) server to integrate SE Ranking data with AI tools.
The API is accessed via a single API key for both Data and Project endpoints.
Search citation: SE Ranking API Reference - SE Ranking API Documentation
